source: data/curation/tasks_master.csv (curated recommended stats / setup / strategy / items)

0.stats: 60 Slayer (required), 70+ in a combat style, 43+ Prayer
0.setup: Nose peg or Slayer helmet equipped (mandatory). Salve amulet (e) for bonus damage on the undead spectre. Melee or Ranged with Protect from Magic; Air spells exploit its elemental weakness.
0.strategy: You MUST wear a nose peg (needs 60 Slayer) or a Slayer helmet, otherwise the spectre uses an unavoidable stat-draining special attack that ignores prayer. With that equipped, just kill one for the task; Protect from Magic blocks its normal hits.

1.stats: 85 Slayer (hard req), 80+ Magic or 80+ Ranged, 70+ Defence, 43+ Prayer
1.setup: Ancient spellbook with Shadow Barrage to stun + ranged/magic to clear respiratory systems; melee (Osmumten's Fang/Emberlight + Avernic) or Tumeken's Shadow for the kill phase
1.strategy: Plain 20-kill count: wake the Sire, Shadow Barrage to stun for 30s, destroy the four respiratory systems, then DPS it down through phases 2-3 avoiding the death explosion at 140 HP.

2.stats: 85 Slayer (hard req), 85+ Magic or 85+ Ranged/Melee, 70+ Defence, 43+ Prayer
2.setup: Same as KC: Shadow Barrage stun + ranged/magic for respiratory phase, then high-accuracy melee or Tumeken's Shadow for kills; Lightbearer to spam specs
2.strategy: 50-kill grind - identical method to the 20 KC task, just more reps; efficiency gear (fast respiratory clears, Lightbearer specs) shortens kills.

3.setup: AoE/multi-target damage during phase 1 (e.g. Shadow Barrage / Burst, or chinning) to clear spawns fast; protection prayers up
3.strategy: Spawns have 15 HP and mature into 60 HP Scions after 15s - use multi-target Ancient spells (Barrage/Burst) or kill spawns immediately each time they appear so none mature.

4.stats: 85 Slayer (hard req), 85+ Magic/Ranged for fast respiratory damage, 70+ Defence, 43+ Prayer
4.setup: Ancient spellbook Shadow Barrage for the single guaranteed stun, then high-DPS ranged/magic to destroy all four respiratory systems within that one 30s stun window
4.strategy: A stun lasts ~30s; you must destroy all four respiratory systems on a single Shadow Barrage stun. Use Shadow Barrage (100% stun chance) and strong DPS so you never need a second stun.

5.setup: Ranged/magic from outside tentacle range during phase 1; protection prayer is not enough (it reduces but does not zero tentacle damage) so positioning is key
5.strategy: External tentacles hit up to 30 (6 with prayer) in phases 1 and 3 - stand out of their reach and keep the Sire stunned so tentacles stay inactive; protection prayer alone won't satisfy 'no damage', avoid being in range.

6.stats: 85 Slayer (hard req), 94 Magic (Vengeance), 70+ Defence, 43+ Prayer; Lunar Diplomacy complete
6.setup: Lunar spellbook for Vengeance (or a second player to cast it on you); cast Veng before the explosion at 140 HP and stand still to take and reflect the blast
6.strategy: The explosion triggers at 140 HP - have Vengeance active and DO NOT run away (unlike normal kills); let the explosion hit you so 75% of the damage reflects to the Sire. Requires Lunar Diplomacy or assistance from a second player.
6.items: Vengeance (Lunar spellbook); Earth runes; Death runes; Astral runes; Lunar Diplomacy (quest for Vengeance)

7.stats: 85 Slayer (hard req), 85+ Magic/Ranged or melee, 70+ Defence, 43+ Prayer
7.setup: High-DPS kill setup (Osmumten's Fang/Emberlight melee or Tumeken's Shadow) plus good run energy to step out of pools immediately
7.strategy: In phase 3 the Sire drops a miasma pool under you every few seconds dealing 10-30/tick centre (2-8 outer) - poison protection doesn't help, just step 2+ tiles off each pool the moment it spawns.

8.stats: 85 Slayer (hard req), 85+ Magic/Ranged, 75+ Defence, 43+ Prayer (74 for Rigour/Augury ideal)
8.setup: Reliable DPS (Tumeken's Shadow or strong melee), Protect from Melee up in phase 2, careful phase-1 positioning out of tentacle range, and good run energy
8.strategy: Combines every avoidance task: stay out of external-tentacle range (phases 1/3), step off every miasma pool, run 2+ tiles from the 140 HP explosion, and always have the right protection prayer up so the Sire never deals unprayed damage.

9.setup: Ranged: armadyl/masori or void, twisted bow / bow of faerdhinen / blowpipe, Protect from Missiles, Eagle Eye/Rigour
9.strategy: Stand under Kree'arra and pray Missiles; bring an Armadyl item or ecumenical keys for repeat entries and chip away 50 kills, ideally in a private instance.
9.items: Armadyl item (Armadyl pendant/mitre/cloak/etc.) or Ecumenical key for boss room access; Crossbow + Mithril grapple (to cross the chasm); Twisted bow or Bow of faerdhinen or Toxic blowpipe; Rigour (74 Prayer) or high Prayer for protection

10.setup: Ranged: masori/armadyl, twisted bow or bow of faerdhinen, Protect from Missiles, Rigour, Ranging/Saradomin brews + restores
10.strategy: Same as the Adept task but 100 kills total; instance the boss and bring extra supplies/Armadyl items to grind kills efficiently.
10.items: Armadyl item or Ecumenical key for boss room access; Crossbow + Mithril grapple (to cross the chasm); Twisted bow or Bow of faerdhinen or Toxic blowpipe; Rigour (74 Prayer) recommended

11.setup: Ranged gear; a salamander or AoE (e.g. chinchompas/burst that clips Kree'arra) so all damage is incidental, never direct
11.strategy: In a private instance, never click Kree'arra; deal all his HP via AoE/splash that hits him while you attack his bodyguards, or via a salamander's secondary/scorch effect that catches him.
11.items: Armadyl item or Ecumenical key for boss room access; Crossbow + Mithril grapple (to cross the chasm); Toxic blowpipe or crossbow/bow to kill bodyguards; Salamander or other AoE/splash option to indirectly damage Kree'arra (optional)

12.setup: Ranged: armadyl/masori, twisted bow/blowpipe, Protect from Missiles, Eagle Eye/Rigour
12.strategy: Kill all three minions first and avoid spawning replacements; lower Kree'arra to near-death only after Kilisa, Skree, and Geerin are dead, then finish him while the room is clear.
12.items: Armadyl item or Ecumenical key for boss room access; Crossbow + Mithril grapple (to cross the chasm); Twisted bow or bow of faerdhinen or Toxic blowpipe

13.setup: Ranged gear, Protect from Missiles always on, positioned so you stay out of melee range
13.strategy: Always keep Kree'arra targeted so he attacks with ranged (not melee), kill the melee bodyguard Flight Kilisa fast, and keep distance/keep attacking so neither boss nor minions ever land a melee hit.
13.items: Armadyl item or Ecumenical key for boss room access; Crossbow + Mithril grapple (to cross the chasm); Twisted bow or bow of faerdhinen or Toxic blowpipe; Protect from Missiles (Prayer)

14.stats: 70+ Ranged (salamanders scale off Ranged/Magic), 70+ Defence, 43+ Prayer; high Ranged/Magic for accuracy vs 200 Magic/200 Range defence
14.setup: Best salamander available (black/Tecu) with harralander tar, ranged accuracy gear, Protect from Missiles; expect a slow kill
14.strategy: Use only the salamander's attack on Kree'arra; salamanders have low accuracy/damage against his high defence so bring lots of tar and supplies for a long fight, optionally use the magic attack style for accuracy.
14.items: Armadyl item or Ecumenical key for boss room access; Crossbow + Mithril grapple (to cross the chasm); Salamander (e.g. Black/Tecu/Orange/Red/Swamp/Green salamander); Harralander tar or appropriate salamander ammo (e.g. for Scorch/Flare/Blaze/Mist attack)

15.setup: Strong ranged setup (masori/armadyl, twisted bow/blowpipe), inventory packed with Saradomin brews, super restores, and ranging potions to survive 30 kills
15.strategy: Bring a brew-heavy inventory (Saradomin brews + super restores) since you cannot restock; manage prayer and HP carefully across all 30 kills in one instanced session.
15.items: Armadyl item or Ecumenical key for boss room access; Crossbow + Mithril grapple (to cross the chasm); Twisted bow or bow of faerdhinen or Toxic blowpipe; Saradomin brews + Super restores (must last 30 kills without leaving)

16.stats: 80+ Ranged or Melee, 70+ Defence, 44+ Prayer, 80+ HP
16.setup: Ranged solo: Bow of Faerdhinen / Armadyl crossbow with rune-tipped bolts, crystal/Masori armour; Protect from Missiles, Eagle Eye/Rigour. Bring food and prayer potions.
16.strategy: Plain kill count to 50. Solo from outside the bodyguards' aggro corner; ranged lets you avoid most of Graardor's melee. Use ecumenical keys or grind 40 Bandos kills to enter each trip.
16.items: Hammer; Ecumenical key (or 40 KC of Bandos followers)

17.setup: Ranged solo: Bow of Faerdhinen / Armadyl crossbow with diamond/ruby bolts (e), crystal or Masori armour, Rigour; or duo/group for faster kills.
17.strategy: Same fight as Adept but 100 kills - a sustained grind, so prioritise efficient supplies (Saradomin brews/prayer pots) and consider duoing or a private instance for consistent kills.
17.items: Hammer; Ecumenical key (or 40 KC of Bandos followers)

18.stats: 94 Magic for Ice Barrage (82 for Ice Burst), 78+ Magic gear, 75+ Defence, 44+ Prayer
18.setup: Ancient Magicks: Ice Barrage/Burst on Graardor, with a shadow/trident or ancient sceptre to deal damage. Ahrim's/ancestral or magic-defence gear; freeze runes (death, water, blood).
18.strategy: Get Graardor low, then freeze him with Ice Barrage/Burst (or Ice ancient sceptre) and deliver the final hit before the freeze ends. Easier in a private instance where bodyguards can be cleared first.
18.items: Hammer; Ecumenical key (or 40 KC); Ancient Magicks spellbook + runes (Ice Barrage/Ice Burst) or Ice ancient sceptre

19.stats: 94 Magic (Ice Barrage), 90+ Magic gear, 70+ Prayer, decent DPS off-style
19.setup: Private instance, clear bodyguards first. Ancient Magicks for chain-freezing; high-DPS weapon (Tumeken's shadow ideal) to kill within the freeze windows.
19.strategy: Chain Ice Barrage so Graardor is frozen the entire fight, attacking only from range while frozen and re-freezing before it expires - he never gets a turn to attack. Clear bodyguards first so only Graardor needs managing.
19.items: Hammer; Ecumenical key (or 40 KC); Ancient Magicks spellbook + freeze runes (Ice Barrage/Burst)

20.setup: Any high-DPS style. Best in a private instance so you control kill order; bring DPS for the sergeants plus Graardor.
20.strategy: Kill all three sergeants first, then finish Graardor before any bodyguard respawns - in a private instance bodyguards do not respawn until reset, making this far easier than in a public room.

21.setup: Private instance, ranged solo (Bow of Faerdhinen / Masori). Kill the three bodyguards first each kill, then handle Graardor; flick prayers/keep distance to avoid all bodyguard hits.
21.strategy: Bodyguards must deal zero damage across two consecutive instanced kills. Clear sergeants fast at the start (using Protect prayers and positioning) before they can splash through, then re-enter for the second kill - any bodyguard hit fails it.

22.stats: 94 Magic (for freezes) or 90+ Ranged, 90+ Defence, 74+ Prayer, 92+ HP
22.setup: Private instance. Either chain-freeze Graardor with Ice Barrage and out-range bodyguards, or use precise prayer-flicking and positioning so nothing connects. Ranged + Protect prayers, freeze runes ideal.
22.strategy: Take zero damage from everything. Freezing Graardor (Ice Barrage) and attacking from outside melee range stops his slam; manage bodyguards by killing/avoiding them with correct overhead prayers. Note Graardor's ranged slam only triggers when his target is in melee range, so staying back avoids it.
22.items: Hammer; Ecumenical key (or 40 KC); Ancient Magicks spellbook + freeze runes (recommended)

23.setup: Private instance, ranged solo (Bow of Faerdhinen / Masori, Rigour). Bring maximum supplies: Saradomin brews, prayer potions/restores, and a full inventory of food.
23.strategy: Stay in the instance for 15 straight kills - never leave the room or the count resets. Bring enough brews/restores to last all 15 kills since you cannot bank; pace prayer usage and use Bandos tassets/efficient gear to survive the marathon.

24.stats: 70+ in primary combat stat, 43+ Prayer, 43+ Defence
24.setup: Any combat style works; Slash melee (Abyssal whip / Saradomin sword), trident, or magic (wind spells) clear brothers fastest. Bring Protect from Melee/Missiles via 43 Prayer.
24.strategy: Just complete 10 full Barrows runs. Kill all six brothers (or skip the chest-spawn brother) to maximise reward potential, then loot the chest 10 separate times; this is purely a kill/clear count.
24.items: Spade; Combat gear (any style); Food; Teleport to Barrows (Barrows teleport tab / Morytania legs)

25.stats: 75+ in primary combat stat, 43+ Prayer, 43+ Defence
25.setup: Efficient Barrows kit: trident or wind spells for the melee brothers (50% wind weakness), whip/blowpipe for Karil/Ahrim. Protect prayers, Salve amulet (e)/(ei) is best in slot since brothers are undead.
25.strategy: Cumulative with task 24 - simply open the chest 25 times total. Use a Salve amulet (ei) and ranged/magic for big damage boosts vs undead to speed up runs.
25.items: Spade; Combat gear (any style); Food; Teleport to Barrows (Barrows teleport tab / Morytania legs)

26.setup: Magic (Trident of the swamp / wind spells, 50% weakness on the melee brothers) or Ranged (blowpipe) so you can stand outside melee range. Protect from Melee on at all times as backup; Salve amulet (ei).
26.strategy: Fight the four melee brothers (Dharok, Verac, Torag, Guthan) one tile away/at distance and keep stepping back so their melee swing never connects, killing each purely with ranged/magic. Protect from Melee covers any accidental step-in. Ahrim and Karil are not part of this task.
26.items: Spade; Ranged or Magic weapon (to attack brothers from range); Food; Prayer potions

27.stats: 75+ Ranged/Magic, 70+ Defence, 43+ Prayer (44+ for Protect from Magic)
27.setup: High-defence setup with full Protect prayer rotation. Magic/Ranged to kill brothers at distance. Salve amulet (ei) and Barrows-resistant armour; pots for Prayer.
27.strategy: Switch the correct overhead prayer for each brother BEFORE engaging: Protect from Magic for Ahrim, Protect from Missiles for Karil, Protect from Melee for the four melee brothers. Kill the melee brothers from a distance to avoid the rare prayer-piercing splash; only the chest needs looting after all six die.
27.items: Spade; Combat gear (any style); Food; Prayer potions

28.setup: Powered staff (Trident) or a damage spell. Target Dharok or another melee brother (50% wind weakness) and use wind spells, or just any spell on the easiest brother. Salve amulet (ei) boosts magic damage vs undead.
28.strategy: Pick one brother (Dharok/Guthan/Torag/Verac all have 50% wind weakness) and deal only magic damage to him until death - do not hit him with melee or ranged. A trident or wind spell with Salve (ei) makes this trivial.
28.items: Spade; Magic weapon (Trident of the seas/swamp, Iban's staff, or any combat spell e.g. Wind spells / Fire Bolt); Runes (if casting standard spells); Food

29.stats: 75+ Attack/Strength or Ranged (for spec weapons), 43+ Prayer, Special attack energy management
29.setup: High-spec-output weapons: Dragon claws or Voidwaker (burst spec damage), or Dragon dagger (p++) spam. Carry several Super restores to refill special energy. Protect from Missiles vs Karil; Salve amulet (ei).
29.strategy: Karil has 100 HP. Only use the special attack button to damage him - never let an auto-attack land. Dragon claws (2x specs ~ up to ~50+) plus a Super restore to top up energy, or repeated Dragon dagger specs, will finish him. Step away or stop attacking between specs so no normal hit connects.
29.items: Spade; A weapon with a special attack that deals damage (e.g. Dragon claws, Voidwaker, Dragon dagger, Toxic blowpipe, Saradomin godsword, Dragon halberd); Special attack restore (Super restore / divine potions); Food

30.setup: No-prayer tank/DPS setup: high Defence armour, Salve amulet (ei), Ranged (blowpipe) or Magic to kill brothers from a distance and minimise incoming hits. Bring Brews/Anglerfish - you will eat through food.
30.strategy: Drain Prayer to 0 before entering (or use a damaging method); since no Protect prayers are allowed, kill the melee brothers at range to dodge their hits and tank Ahrim/Karil with high Defence and lots of food. Watch Dharok's set effect at low HP - keep your own HP topped up and kill him quickly.
30.items: Spade; Strong defensive/high-DPS gear (no protection prayers usable); Plenty of food (Anglerfish/Saradomin brews); Magic or Ranged weapon to fight from distance

31.stats: 60 Slayer, 80+ HP, 80+ Ranged or 65+ Magic, 37+ Prayer, high melee stats if meleeing
31.setup: Mirror shield (or V's shield) MANDATORY in the shield slot to negate the stat-drain/petrify attack. Earth spells (Earth surge / earth-attuned Tumeken's shadow) are strongest due to 40% earth weakness; alternatively a strong ranged or melee setup with Protect from Magic.
31.strategy: Pure Kill Count task: just kill one Basilisk Knight. Equip a Mirror shield or V's shield before engaging or you take heavy damage and stat drains. Fight in Jormungand's Prison with Protect from Magic; magic (earth spells) is the most efficient style given its 40% earth weakness. Note they are immune to cannon, thralls, poison and venom.

32.stats: 70+ Ranged or 70+ Melee stats, 43+ Prayer, 60+ Defence
32.setup: Ranged (crossbow/bow with anti-dragon shield) or melee with anti-dragon shield + antifire potion; Protect from Magic against dragonfire if not fully protected
32.strategy: Just one kill needed. Bring an anti-dragon shield (and/or antifire potion) before engaging - dragonfire hits up to 50. Use a safespot (Taverley Dungeon, Lava Maze, Evil Chicken's Lair) to range it with no dragonfire risk, since dragons only breathe at melee range.
32.items: Anti-dragon shield or Dragonfire shield; Antifire potion (optional alternative)

33.setup: Melee with high magic-defence gear (dragonhide body/chaps, or proselyte/Verac's for prayer); any decent melee weapon, demonbane weapons (e.g. Arclight, Silverlight) hit hard as they are demons. Protect from Melee prayer.
33.strategy: Bloodvelds deal magic-based damage rolled against your MAGIC defence, so wear dragonhide for accuracy reduction, but pray Protect from Melee (not Magic) to negate hits. Simple single kill - safespot in the Slayer Tower or Catacombs if low level.

34.setup: Ranged: crossbow (rune/dragon/armadyl) with diamond/dragonstone bolts, or blowpipe; antifire protection plus Protect from Magic. Magic also viable due to water weakness.
34.strategy: Plain kill count. Drink an antifire potion (negates dragonfire) and pray Protect from Magic to fully negate magic and dragonfire damage, then safespot or DPS with Ranged; only its melee can hit through, so stay out of melee range to take near-zero damage.
34.items: Antifire potion (or extended/super antifire); Anti-dragon shield (if not using extended antifire)

35.stats: 50+ Attack, 50+ Strength, 50+ Defence, 43+ Prayer (or 59+ Magic / 60+ Ranged)
35.setup: Rune scimitar + rune armour, or Fire Blast (50% fire weakness), with Protect from Magic. Bring a woodcutting axe or magic secateurs to kill growthlings.
35.strategy: Spend a mossy key to enter, kill the 3 growthlings (one-shot with an axe/secateurs) to remove her damage immunity, then DPS her down once and open the chest.

36.stats: 50+ Attack, 50+ Strength, 50+ Defence, 43+ Prayer (or 59+ Magic / 60+ Ranged)
36.setup: Rune scimitar + rune armour, or Fire Blast, with Protect from Magic. Woodcutting axe / magic secateurs for growthlings. Stock multiple mossy keys for repeat trips.
36.strategy: Repeat the kill 5 times; each entry consumes a mossy key, so farm keys from moss giants beforehand to chain runs efficiently.

37.stats: 43+ Prayer, plus 50+ melee stats or 59+ Magic / 60+ Ranged
37.setup: Any viable combat style with 43+ Prayer to run Protect from Magic. Bring an axe/secateurs and prayer potions.
37.strategy: Protect from Magic is already the recommended prayer for this fight, so simply keep it on for the whole kill; she also hits crush melee but the task only requires the magic prayer active on the kill.

38.stats: Any combat; a woodcutting axe or magic secateurs to one-shot growthlings
38.setup: Equip/inventory a woodcutting axe (any tier) or magic secateurs which one-shot growthlings; melee or mage Bryophyta otherwise.
38.strategy: Wait until all 3 growthlings have spawned, then one-shot them in quick succession with an axe/secateurs so the last dies within 3 seconds of the first; do not kill the first until the others are up.
38.items: Mossy key; Bronze axe; Iron axe; Steel axe; Black axe; Mithril axe; Adamant axe; Rune axe; Dragon axe; Crystal axe; Magic secateurs

39.stats: 50+ melee stats or 59+ Magic / 60+ Ranged, 43+ Prayer; antipoison recommended
39.setup: Standard Bryophyta setup plus an antipoison/antidote (or super antipoison) to block her poison.
39.strategy: Bryophyta only poisons on members' worlds (8+ damage); either do the kill on a F2P world where she cannot poison you, or keep an antipoison active so you never take a poison tick.

40.stats: 50+ melee or ranged stats, 43+ Prayer; ability to apply poison/venom
40.setup: Members' world only. Use a poisoned weapon (weapon poison on a blade) or a venom source like the Toxic blowpipe / Trident of the swamp; Bryophyta has 0% poison/venom resistance.
40.strategy: Bring her to very low HP, then stop attacking and let an active poison/venom tick deliver the killing blow; venom (blowpipe/serpentine, swamp trident) ramps high and is the easiest way to land the final hit. Poison is members-only.
40.items: Mossy key; Weapon poison; Weapon poison(+); Weapon poison(++); Trident of the swamp; Toxic blowpipe

41.stats: 50+ Attack, 50+ Strength, 50+ Defence, 43+ Prayer (or 59+ Magic / 60+ Ranged)
41.setup: F2P-legal gear: rune scimitar + rune armour with Protect from Magic, or F2P Fire spells/maple shortbow. Woodcutting axe for growthlings.
41.strategy: Log into a free-to-play world before entering and complete a normal kill; on F2P she also cannot poison you, so it is the safest version of the fight.

42.setup: Ranged: Toxic blowpipe or rune crossbow / dragon hunter crossbow style, with high-defence/risk-appropriate Wilderness gear, Protect from Magic active.
42.strategy: Range Callisto from a distance (defStab 150 vs defRange 50, magic def 0). Keep Protect from Magic on to negate the magic knockback, step away from bear traps spawned at 66% and 33% HP, and bring escape supplies for PKers. Just rack up 10 kills.
42.items: Prayer potion; Food (Saradomin brew / sharks); Anti-venom

43.setup: Ranged: Toxic blowpipe or dragon hunter crossbow + Dragonfire/anti-style protection; efficient Wilderness ranging setup with Protect from Magic.
43.strategy: Same approach as the Adept task but double the kills (20). Use Protect from Magic, avoid bear traps, and prioritise survivability/escape in the Wilderness; a god-style ranged setup speeds the grind. Artio (its world-boss/singles variant) counts toward the same total.
43.items: Prayer potion; Food (Saradomin brew / sharks); Anti-venom

44.setup: Arclight (or other demonbane sword) with melee gear, or water spells (e.g. Ice Barrage/Burst) for the magic weakness; Protect from Magic/Melee as needed
44.strategy: Assemble a Dark totem from 3 totem pieces (Catacombs of Kourend drops) and use it on the altar in the central Catacombs to spawn Skotizo. Destroy the 4 dark altars to remove his buffs, then DPS him down.

45.setup: Arclight/Emberlight demonbane sword with melee gear, or water magic; bring food and Prayer potions for repeated trips
45.strategy: Requires 5 separate kills, so you need 5 assembled Dark totems. Farm totem pieces in the Catacombs of Kourend while killing other monsters, then repeat the Skotizo fight five times.

46.setup: Arclight/Emberlight demonbane melee or water magic; high single-target burst to clear altars and finish quickly
46.strategy: The 4 awakened altars heal and buff Skotizo while active. Destroy all four altars first (attack each one) and keep them all down, then land the killing blow with no altar active.

47.setup: Arclight/Emberlight or strong water magic; flick Protect from Magic and Protect from Melee correctly, high DPS to shorten the fight
47.strategy: Skotizo uses both stab (melee) and magic; you must overhead-pray correctly the whole fight and avoid the dark spinners' attacks. Kill the 4 altars first to lower his power, prayer-flick his attacks, and keep distance from spinners to take no damage.

48.stats: 70+ Melee (or relevant style for the demonbane weapon), 70+ Defence, 43+ Prayer
48.setup: Arclight or Emberlight (best demonbane swords); Silverlight/Darklight also qualify, as do Burning claws, Scorching bow, Purging staff, or Holy water
48.strategy: Simply equip any qualifying demonbane weapon (Arclight is the common choice and also gives a demon damage bonus) and kill Skotizo while it is wielded. This overlaps naturally with a normal kill.
48.items: Silverlight; Darklight; Arclight; Emberlight; Burning claws; Scorching bow; Purging staff; Holy water; Dark totem

49.setup: Water-based magic (Ice spells/Tome of water) to exploit the 40% water weakness, or a strong non-demonbane melee weapon; bring Prayer potions and food
49.strategy: Use Skotizo's 40% water weakness with water magic (e.g. Ice Barrage, Tome of water) for solid damage without a demonbane weapon. Avoid all listed demonbane items; killing the altars first speeds it up since you lack the demon damage bonus.

50.setup: Chinchompas (black/red ideal) on Short fuse/medium attack range; demonbane or water magic to bring him low, then switch to chins for the finish
50.strategy: Skotizo has high Ranged defence (+130), so chinning is inefficient for the whole fight. Bring him to very low HP with your main style, then switch to a chinchompa and ensure the explosion lands the killing blow. Standing so the chinchompa AoE hits him secures the final hit.
50.items: Chinchompa; Red chinchompa; Black chinchompa; Dark totem

51.setup: Melee: Slayer helm (i), Inquisitor's/Bandos, stab weapon (Emberlight/Scythe), Piety; flick Protect from Melee. Bring antifire-free awareness for lava and prayer potions.
51.strategy: Pure kill count (75 kills). Use Protect from Melee for the main fight and prayer-flick the three Summoned Souls (red=melee, blue=magic, green=ranged) below 400 HP to negate damage; step off lava pools as they form.

52.setup: Melee: Slayer helm (i), Inquisitor's/Bandos, stab weapon, Piety; Spectral spirit shield for souls phase to halve prayer drain. Protect from Melee, prayer potions.
52.strategy: Pure kill count (150 kills) - same method as the 75-kill task, just sustained. Use a spectral spirit shield during the Summoned Souls phase to cut prayer drain (30 -> 15) and extend trips.

53.stats: 90+ Attack/Strength, 80+ Defence, 75+ Prayer, 91 Slayer (high DPS gear strongly preferred)
53.setup: Max melee burst: Scythe of vitur or Emberlight, Inquisitor's, amulet of rancour, Piety; or Twisted bow on Rigour. Use a special-attack weapon for burst.
53.strategy: Souls appear when Cerberus drops below 400 HP. Bring maximum DPS (and spec weapons) so you can take her from above 400 HP to dead before the howl resolves the soul attacks - high-damage gear and good prayer (Piety/Rigour) make this consistent.

54.setup: Melee: Slayer helm (i), Inquisitor's/Bandos, stab weapon, Piety; Spectral spirit shield to survive multiple soul cycles. Quick-prayer/overhead switching ready.
54.strategy: Opposite of Arooo No More - deliberately let souls spawn and prayer-flick each one correctly (red=melee, blue=magic, green=ranged, attacking west to east). Negate at least 6 soul attacks (2+ full waves); spectral shield reduces the 30-point drain per blocked hit.

55.setup: Melee or Ranged; ranged (Twisted bow on Rigour) makes lava avoidance easier since the pool isn't applied on the cast tick. Protect from Melee otherwise standard.
55.strategy: Despite the name, no antifire is needed - just avoid standing on lava. Pools only damage the tile you stand on (post-June 2025). Watch the spit animation and step off the targeted tile each time; fighting at range gives an extra reaction tick.

56.stats: 85+ Ranged or Magic, 80+ Defence, 74+ Prayer, 91 Slayer
56.setup: Ranged: Twisted bow, Masori (f), anguish, Rigour with Protect from Melee active; stay at distance. Or melee with Protect from Melee maintained throughout.
56.strategy: Keep Protect from Melee active for the whole fight - Cerberus's melee can hit at range, so the overhead must never lapse (including during the souls phase, where you also flick the soul prayers). Fighting at range reduces melee exposure but the protection prayer is the actual requirement.

57.setup: Ranged: crossbow (Rune/Dragon hunter) or blowpipe, black d'hide, Protect from Magic; OR air spells (Trident/Sang/Tumeken's) to exploit its 50% air weakness. Anti-PK/lightweight Wilderness kit only.
